intro: The Windows threat landscape from April 12–20, 2026, was dominated by activity from Chaotic Eclipse. This archive of 17 articles details a severity mix of one critical, 12 high, and four medium vulnerabilities. Key CVEs covered include CVE-2026-33104 (CVSS 7.8), CVE-2026-26179 (CVSS 7.5), and CVE-2026-32183 (CVSS 7.5), alongside earlier issues like CVE-2024-20662 and CVE-2024-21412. The reporting provides focused analysis on these specific exploits and the associated threat actor's methods.
